subject: Add common templates to common chart
commit_message:
Add common templates to common chart

Issue-ID: OOM-1971
Change-Id: I65f9891f1d3586c0633b252a47b461c887d5b8ad
Signed-off-by: Kajur, Harish (vk250x) <vk250x@att.com>
[Move secret template to a separate commit]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
